payload.description: Joint MNR-LIRR Committee Meeting book containing Safety Reports, Financial Reports, Ridership Reports, Capital Program Reports, Procurement Actions, and Information Items for the March 17, 2021 meeting.

tool_args.label: Joint MNR-LIRR Committee Meeting - March 2021
tool_args.raw_text: Joint Metro-North and Long Island Committees Meeting, 2 Broadway 20th Floor Board Room New York, NY, Wednesday, 3/17/2021 10:00 AM - 5:00 PM ET

payload.description: Joint Metro-North and Long Island Committees Meeting on March 17, 2021 at 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Board Room, New York, NY. Agenda included Public Comments, Safety Reports, Financial Reports, Ridership Reports, Capital Program Reports, and Procurement Actions.

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

tool_args.label: LIRR TrainTime App Chat Feature Launch
tool_args.raw_text: February 2021: In a major upgrade for customer communications and a first in the region, LIRR introduced a significant new feature of the LIRR TrainTime app, a chat function that LIRR customers can use to chat in real-time directly with LIRR customer service staff.

payload.description: LIRR introduced a chat function in the LIRR TrainTime app for real-time customer service communication.

tool_args.label: MNR Full Positive Train Control Operability Completion
tool_args.raw_text: On December 23, 2020, Metro-North President Catherine Rinaldi announced the completion of full Positive Train Control (PTC) operability on our Hudson, Harlem and New Haven mainlines and Pascack Valley and Port Jervis branch lines for the vast majority of our railroad's locomotive fleet.

payload.description: Metro-North completed full Positive Train Control (PTC) operability on Hudson, Harlem and New Haven mainlines and Pascack Valley and Port Jervis branch lines.

tool_args.label: Loop 1A Track in F Interlocking
tool_args.raw_text: furnishing and installation of track, special trackwork, third rail, and catenary for the Loop 1A track in F Interlocking

payload.description: Furnishing and installation of track, special trackwork, third rail, and catenary for Loop 1A track in F Interlocking, providing access for LIRR to the new Mid-Day Storage Yard and for Amtrak to Sunnyside Yard/Acela maintenance facility. Part of East Side Access (ESA) project under Contract CH058A with Skanska USA Civil Northeast Inc.

tool_args.label: Backbone Communication System Extension to Mid-Day Storage Yard
tool_args.raw_text: Retroactive contract modification to extend the Backbone Communication System to support phones, Public Address and Variable Message Signs, and the Automatic Temperature Control system into the Mid-Day Storage Yard.

payload.project_name: Backbone Communication System Extension to Mid-Day Storage Yard
payload.description: Extension of the Backbone Communication System to support phones, Public Address and Variable Message Signs, and Automatic Temperature Control system into the Mid-Day Storage Yard. Under East Side Access (ESA) project Contract CS179 with Tutor Perini Corporation.

tool_args.label: St. Albans Station Renewal
tool_args.raw_text: The St. Alban's Station Renewal project is complete. This project included rehabilitation of the concrete platform, replacement of concrete steps with new Amstep step treads, installation of new ADA handrails at stairs, installation of a new platform shelter shed, new signage, upgrading of the lighting to LED lighting, and replacing chain link fence with new high security fence.

payload.description: Rehabilitation of the concrete platform, replacement of concrete steps, installation of ADA handrails, platform shelter shed, new signage, LED lighting upgrade, and high security fence replacement. Completed under Small Business Development Program. Project budget: $5.05M.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Wreck Lead Bridge Rehabilitation
tool_args.raw_text: A contract for the Wreck Lead Bridge Rehab project was awarded to Kiewit Infrastructure Co. for $2,949,000.

payload.description: Mechanical rehabilitation of the movable bridge components to improve bridge reliability levels, including rehabilitating lower and upper span locks, installing a new centering device, and rebalancing the bridge. Contract awarded to Kiewit Infrastructure Co. for $2,949,000. Project budget: $4.97M.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Purchase of 27 Dual Mode Locomotives
tool_args.raw_text: This contract was awarded in February 2021 for the design, construction, testing and placement in service of 27 dual mode diesel/DC electric locomotives.

payload.description: Design, construction, testing and placement in service of 27 dual mode diesel/DC electric locomotives. Contract awarded at $213,000,000.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Turnouts – Mainline/High Speed Project
tool_args.raw_text: This project included turnout replacement with high speed turnouts at some locations. By replacing with high speed turnouts, those territories will be able to accommodate speeds of 60 to 95 miles per hour, compared to the current limit of 45 miles per hour.

payload.description: Turnout replacement with high speed turnouts to accommodate speeds of 60 to 95 miles per hour, compared to the current limit of 45 miles per hour. This improvement will result in reduced travel time for Metro-North customers. Project budget: $44,609,309.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.raw_text: On-Time Performance (OTP) for the month of February closed at 95.6%, which is above the monthly goal of 94.0%.

tool_args.raw_text: For the reporting period ending January 2021, the average Reportable Customer Injury Rate was 5.36 injuries per million customers as compared to 2.4 injuries per million customers over 2019.

tool_args.label: Final Grade Crossing Closure in LIRR Expansion Project
tool_args.raw_text: The final of eight grade crossings to be eliminated through the MTA LIRR Expansion Project closed in February 2021.

payload.claim_text: The final of eight grade crossings to be eliminated through the MTA LIRR Expansion Project closed in February 2021.
payload.description: Main Street Crossing closed February 2021 and will reopen as a pedestrian overpass. Seven prior crossings were closed between March 2019 and November 2020.

tool_args.label: LIRR Workforce Vaccination Rate February 2021
tool_args.raw_text: by the end of February over twenty percent of the Long Island Rail Road workforce has been vaccinated.

payload.claim_text: By the end of February over twenty percent of the Long Island Rail Road workforce has been vaccinated.
payload.description: LIRR employees received vaccinations through Javits Center, Nassau County and Suffolk County programs, and NYC Transit in Brooklyn.

tool_args.label: LIRR Fare Not Collected Rate February 2021
tool_args.raw_text: In February 2021, the LIRR reported a Fare Not Collected Rate of 2.9%, this is an improvement over February 2020's Fare Not Collected Rate of 7.6%.

payload.claim_text: In February 2021, the LIRR reported a Fare Not Collected Rate of 2.9%, this is an improvement over February 2020's Fare Not Collected Rate of 7.6%. The LIRR resumed its onboard revenue compliance program in July 2020 after suspending it due to COVID-19.

tool_args.label: MNR Met FRA PTC Mandate August 2020
tool_args.raw_text: MNR met the Federal Railroad Administration (FRA) PTC mandate on August 15, 2020.

payload.claim_text: MNR met the Federal Railroad Administration (FRA) PTC mandate on August 15, 2020.
payload.description: All wayside and on-board PTC equipment installations as required in the Implementation Plan to support Revenue Service Demonstration (RSD) have been completed. 244.3 miles (100% East of Hudson) of track are in full PTC protection.

tool_args.label: MNR Service Delivery February 2021
tool_args.raw_text: February service delivery operated above goal at 98.0% with YTD at 98.1%.

payload.claim_text: February service delivery operated above goal at 98.0% with YTD at 98.1%.
payload.description: A significant winter storm on Monday Feb 1st dropped an average of 18 inches across MNR and forced a shutdown of service from GCT at 3PM. Full service was restored the following morning with residual delays. February 2021 was the 8th snowiest on record.

tool_args.label: Customer Service Initiative Outlying Stations Upgrades
tool_args.raw_text: The CSI project will enhance the customers' experience and improve operations with a system-wide upgrade of the public address, visual information and video surveillance/access control systems at twenty (20) Metro-North stations and facilities throughout New York.

payload.claim_text: The CSI project will enhance the customers' experience and improve operations with a system-wide upgrade of the public address, visual information and video surveillance/access control systems at twenty (20) Metro-North stations and facilities throughout New York.
payload.description: Project includes upgrades to elevator monitoring providing network connectivity for new and existing equipment and real-time data improvements.

tool_args.label: Long Beach Branch Signal Cutover - Weekend of April 17-18, 2021
tool_args.raw_text: On the weekend of April 17-18, the Long Beach Branch between Long Beach and Valley Stream, as well as both main tracks of the Atlantic Branch between Valley Stream and Jamaica, will be out of service for a period of approximately 54 hours while a Signal Cutover is performed as part of the Hurricane Sandy Restoration Project.

payload.description: Long Beach Branch signal cutover as part of Hurricane Sandy Restoration Project. Long Beach Branch between Long Beach and Valley Stream, and Atlantic Branch between Valley Stream and Jamaica out of service for approximately 54 hours. Bus replacement service on Far Rockaway and Long Beach Branches.

tool_args.label: Hurricane Sandy Restoration - Long Beach Branch Signal Cutover
tool_args.raw_text: Signal Cutover on the Long Beach Branch as part of the Hurricane Sandy Restoration Project

payload.project_name: Hurricane Sandy Restoration - Long Beach Branch Signal Cutover
payload.description: Signal Cutover on the Long Beach Branch between Long Beach and Valley Stream, and both main tracks of the Atlantic Branch between Valley Stream and Jamaica. Weekend of April 17-18, 2021, approximately 54 hours outage. Temporary bus service for Far Rockaway and Long Beach Branches. West Hempstead Branch trains operate on adjusted schedules.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: MTA C&D - Loop 1A Track Contract CH058A Ratification
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Construction and Development requests the Board ratify a retroactive modification (No. 31) for furnishing and installation of track, special trackwork, third rail, and catenary for the Loop 1A track in F Interlocking.

payload.description: MTA Construction and Development implements East Side Access infrastructure for Loop 1A track in F Interlocking, which provides access for LIRR to the new Mid-Day Storage Yard.

payload.description: LIRR presented the 2020 Annual Elevator/Escalator Report to the Joint Committee at the March 2021 meeting.
